description: An LLM agent that proposes and executes deployments from a chat interface, calling MCP tools against CI/CD and cloud APIs.

entry_points.name: MCP tool call to deploy API

threats.title: Indirect prompt injection via repo content drives an unintended deploy
Agent escalates from read to write on cloud control plane
Forged webhook payload triggers deploy of attacker-controlled commit
Audit log entry suppressed so an action cannot be attributed
Deploy tool reads customer data outside its task scope

mitigations.description: Re-read source-of-truth deploy policy before any privileged action; never act from compressed context
Independent admission gate authorises each tool call against per-action policy; default deny
Verify webhook HMAC signature and pin to known commit refs before acting
Append-only audit log with evidence hash emitted at decision time, outside agent control
